---
title: Conducting pathway analysis for all cluster with updated script
date: 2024-07-11
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
engine: knitr
---

# Goal of this analysis

1. Adapted Ian's script to conduct pathway analysis

# Files and directories

## Input

List of markers can be found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240708/ubc_markers.csv`

## Output

The output can be found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240711`

# Process and Results

Using the `clustree` conda environment

I made some changes to Ian's pathway analysis script and saved the adapted version as a separate script.

  1. I added more print statements regarding the number of markers we have

  2. Added a log file to collect all the outputs

  3. Adapted the script to be able to run multiple clusters instead of just one

  4. Changed the naming to be more generic

Now lets run the pathway analysis script. 
```{bash eval=FALSE}
conda activate clustree
cd /u/llau/software/mb_scrnaseq/MB_scRNAseq/scrnaseq_Leo/utilities
Rscript ubcs_gost_enrichment.R --de_gene_file /.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240708/ubc_markers.csv --out_dir /.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240711
```
